title: Pika*nchi Life Is Hard Dakedo Happy
original_title: ピカ☆ンチ LIFE IS HARDだけどHAPPY
overview: "Pika*nchi Life Is Hard Dakedo Happy" centers around five friends who are residents in a Tokyo apartment complex. Now senior high school students, the five friends live the wild life in Harajuku before encountering unforeseen surprises.
